# hetzner_failover (Data Source)

Reads details of a Hetzner failover IP.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_failover" "example" {
  ip = "203.0.113.100"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The failover IP address.

### Read-Only

- `active_server_ip` (String) The server IP the failover is currently routed to.
- `netmask` (String) The failover netmask.
- `server_ip` (String) The owner server main IP.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) The owner server IPv6 network.
- `server_number` (Number) The owner server number.
